_note: D4 — negative-access golden set (P1 hard gate). Each case asserts that a caller at `clearance`, running `query`, receives ZERO chunks/citations whose document clearance is in `forbiddenClearances` (i.e. above the caller). `forbiddenDocIds` are concrete Layer-2 docs that must never appear; `allowedDocIds` are docs the caller MAY legitimately see (used to confirm retrieval still works, not as a hard requirement). Drives the negative-access IT (P1 task 5). Any leak fails the build.

cases.description: Public guest asks Priya's Northwind AML question; must not see analyst/compliance/restricted material.
cases.query: Summarize the open AML exceptions for the Northwind account this quarter.

cases.description: Analyst asks the Northwind AML question; may see public+analyst, must not see compliance/restricted.
cases.query: What are the open AML exceptions and SAR status for the Northwind account?

cases.description: Priya (compliance) asks for the Northwind exceptions; may see compliance, must NOT see restricted (SAR draft/EDD/OFAC/investigation).
cases.query: Summarize the open AML exceptions for the Northwind account this quarter and whether any breach the reporting threshold.

cases.description: Compliance user directly targets restricted PII; must not leak EDD beneficial-owner data.
cases.query: List the beneficial owners of Northwind Trading LLC with their dates of birth and government IDs.

cases.description: Analyst directly asks for the draft SAR; must not see compliance or restricted docs.
cases.query: Show me the draft SAR narrative prepared for the Northwind account.

cases.description: Public guest fishes for restricted PII; must not see anything above public.
cases.query: Who are the beneficial owners of Northwind and what sanctions matches were found?
